formulas.label: e0200
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}R_{1}^{g} = \underset{\left(i^{'} , j^{'} , t^{'} , \tau^{'}\right) \in \psi_{g}^{a}}{\sum} \underset{f \left|\right. \left(i^{'} , j^{'} , t^{'} , \tau^{'}\right) \in A_{f}}{\sum} x_{i^{'} , j^{'} , t^{'} , \tau^{'}}^{f} - 1 \\ R_{2}^{i , t , k} = \underset{t^{'} \in \left[t , t + T_{k}^{r} + T^{r}\right)}{\sum} \underset{\left(i , j^{'} , t^{'} , \tau^{'}\right) \in \delta_{i , t^{'}}^{+}}{\sum} \underset{f \left|\right. \left(i , j^{'} , t^{'} , \tau^{'}\right) \in A_{f}}{\sum} x_{i , j^{'} , t^{'} , \tau^{'}}^{f} - 1 \\ R_{3}^{j , \tau , k} = \underset{\tau^{'} \in \left[\tau , \tau + T_{k}^{r} + T^{r}\right)}{\sum} \underset{\left(i^{'} , j , t^{'} , \tau^{'}\right) \in \delta_{j , \tau^{'}}^{-}}{\sum} \underset{f \left|\right. \left(i^{'} , j , t^{'} , \tau^{'}\right) \in A_{f}}{\sum} x_{i^{'} , j , t^{'} , \tau^{'}}^{f} - 1 \\ R_{4}^{g} = \underset{\left(i^{'} , j^{'} , t^{'} , \tau^{'}\right) \in \psi_{g}^{a} \backslash \left(i^{'} = o_{g} \cap j^{'} \neq d_{g}\right)}{\sum} \underset{f \left|\right. \left(i^{'} , j^{'} , t^{'} , \tau^{'}\right) \in A_{f}}{\sum} x_{i^{'} , j^{'} , t^{'} , \tau^{'}}^{f} - 1 \\ R_{5}^{g} = \underset{f \left|\right. \left(i^{'} , j^{'} , t^{'} , \tau^{'}\right) \in A_{f}}{\sum} \left(x_{g}^{f} + y_{g}^{f}\right) - 1\end{matrix}

formulas.label: e0170
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}Z_{f}^{\mathit{LR}} = \underset{g \in A_{f}}{\sum} x_{g}^{f} \cdot c_{g}^{f} + \left[\underset{g \in A_{f}^{\mathit{se}}}{\sum} x_{g}^{f} \cdot \underset{\left(i^{'} , j^{'} , t^{'} , \tau^{'}\right) \in \psi_{g}^{b}}{\sum} \lambda_{1}^{i^{'} , j^{'} , t^{'} , \tau^{'}}\right] + \left[\underset{g \in A_{f}^{a}}{\sum} x_{g}^{f} \cdot \underset{t^{'} \in \left(\overset{̂}{o}_{g} - T_{k}^{r} - T^{r} , \overset{̂}{o}_{g}\right]}{\sum} \lambda_{2}^{o_{g} , t^{'} , k \left(o_{g}\right)}\right] \\ + \left[\underset{g \in A_{f}^{d}}{\sum} x_{g}^{f} \cdot \underset{\tau^{'} \in \left(\overset{̂}{d}_{g} - T_{k}^{r} - T^{r} , \overset{̂}{d}_{g}\right]}{\sum} \lambda_{3}^{d_{g} , \tau^{'} , k \left(d_{g}\right)}\right] + \left[\underset{g \in A_{f}^{a}}{\sum} x_{g}^{f} \cdot \underset{\left(o_{g} , d_{g} , t^{'} , \tau^{'}\right) \in \psi_{g}^{b}}{\sum} \lambda_{4}^{o_{g} , d_{g} , t^{'} , \tau^{'}}\right] \\ + \left[\underset{g \in A_{f}^{d}}{\sum} x_{g}^{f} \cdot \underset{\left(i^{'} , j^{'} , t^{'} , \tau^{'}\right) \in \psi_{g}^{b} \backslash j^{'} = d_{g}}{\sum} \lambda_{4}^{i^{'} , j^{'} , t^{'} , \tau^{'}}\right] + \left[\underset{g \in A_{f}^{\mathit{st}}}{\sum} x_{g}^{f} \cdot \lambda_{5}^{g}\right] + \left[\underset{g \in A_{f}^{\mathit{st}}}{\sum} y_{g}^{f} \cdot \lambda_{5}^{g}\right] + C \cdot \theta_{f} \\ = \underset{g \in A_{f}}{\sum} x_{g}^{f} \cdot \overset{̂}{c}_{g} + C \cdot \theta_{f}\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}min Z_{f}^{\mathit{ADMM}} = \underset{g \in A_{f}}{\sum} x_{g}^{f} \cdot c_{g}^{f} + \underset{g \in A_{f}^{\mathit{se}}}{\sum} x_{g}^{f} \cdot D_{1}^{g} + \underset{k}{\sum} \underset{g \in \delta_{o_{g} , \overset{̂}{o}_{g}}^{+} \cap A_{f} \left|\right. o_{g} \in N_{k}^{a}}{\sum} x_{g}^{f} \cdot D_{2}^{g} + \underset{k}{\sum} \underset{g \in \delta_{d_{g} , \overset{̂}{d}_{g}}^{-} \cap A_{f} \left|\right. d_{g} \in N_{k}^{d}}{\sum} x_{g}^{f} \cdot D_{3}^{g} \\ + \underset{g \in A_{f}^{a}}{\sum} x_{g}^{f} \cdot D_{4 a}^{g} + \underset{g \in A_{f}^{d}}{\sum} x_{g}^{f} \cdot D_{4 d}^{g} + \underset{g \in A_{f}^{\mathit{st}}}{\sum} x_{g}^{f} \cdot D_{5}^{g} + \underset{g \in A_{f}^{\mathit{st}}}{\sum} y_{g}^{f} \cdot D_{5}^{g} + C \cdot \theta_{f} \\ = \underset{g \in A_{f}}{\sum} \overset{̃}{c}_{g}^{f} \cdot x_{g}^{f} + C \cdot \theta_{f}\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}min Z_{4} = \left(24\right) + \frac{\rho_{1}}{2} \underset{g \in A^{\mathit{se}}}{\sum} \left[R_{1}^{g} + s_{g}\right]^{2} + \frac{\rho_{2}}{2} \underset{k}{\sum} \underset{\left(i , t\right) \left|\right. i \in N_{k}^{a}}{\sum} \left[R_{2}^{i , t , k} + s_{i , t , k}\right]^{2} \\ + \frac{\rho_{3}}{2} \underset{k}{\sum} \underset{\left(j , \tau\right) \left|\right. j \in N_{k}^{d}}{\sum} \left[R_{3}^{j , \tau , k} + s_{j , \tau , k}\right]^{2} + \frac{\rho_{4}}{2} \underset{g \in A^{a}}{\sum} \left[R_{4}^{g} + s_{g}\right]^{2} + \frac{\rho_{5}}{2} \underset{g \in A^{\mathit{st}}}{\sum} \left[R_{5}^{g} + s_{g}\right]^{2}\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}F \left(x_{f}\right) = \left(\sum x_{f} + \sum \underset{f \in F^{'}}{\sum} x_{f} + s - 1\right)^{2} \\ = \left(\sum x_{f}\right)^{2} + 2 \left(\sum x_{f}\right) \left[\left(\sum \underset{f \in F^{'}}{\sum} x_{f}\right) + s - 1\right] + \left[\left(\sum \underset{f \in F^{'}}{\sum} x_{f}\right) + s - 1\right]^{2} \\ = \sum x_{f} + 2 \left(\sum x_{f}\right) \left[\left(\sum \underset{f \in F^{'}}{\sum} x_{f}\right) + s - 1\right] + \left[\left(\sum \underset{f \in F^{'}}{\sum} x_{f}\right) + s - 1\right]^{2} \\ = \sum x_{f} \left[2 \left(\sum \underset{f \in F^{'}}{\sum} x_{f}\right) + 2 s - 1\right] + \left[\left(\sum \underset{f \in F^{'}}{\sum} x_{f}\right) + s - 1\right]^{2}\end{matrix}

formulas.label: e0065
formulas.latex: F \left(s\right) = s^{2} + 2 s \left(\sum x_{f} + \sum \underset{f \in F^{'}}{\sum} x_{f} - 1\right) + \mathit{Constant}
formulas.mathml:
<mml:math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/ja/dtd" xmlns:xoe="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/xoe/dtd" xmlns:bk="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/bk/dtd" xmlns:cals="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/cals/dtd" xmlns:ce="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/dtd" xmlns:ja="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/ja/dtd" xmlns:sa="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/struct-aff/dtd" xmlns:sb="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/struct-bib/dtd" xmlns:tb="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/common/table/dtd" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" xmlns:xocs="http://www.elsevier.com/xml/xocs/dtd" xmlns:dc="http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/" xmlns:dcterms="http://purl.org/dc/terms/" xmlns:prism="http://prismstandard.org/namespaces/basic/2.0/" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" altimg="si330.svg">

                                 <mml:mfenced close=")" open="(">
                                    <mml:mrow>
                                       <mml:mi>s</mml:mi>

                                 </mml:mfenced>

                              <mml:mo linebreak="goodbreak">=</mml:mo>
                              <mml:msup>
                                 <mml:mrow>
                                    <mml:mi>s</mml:mi>
                                 </mml:mrow>
                                 <mml:mrow>
                                    <mml:mn>2</mml:mn>
                                 </mml:mrow>
                              </mml:msup>
                              <mml:mo linebreak="badbreak">+</mml:mo>
                              <mml:mn>2</mml:mn>
                              <mml:mi>s</mml:mi>
                              <mml:mrow>
                                 <mml:mfenced close=")" open="(">
                                    <mml:mrow>
                                       <mml:mrow>
                                          <mml:mo>∑</mml:mo>
                                       </mml:mrow>
                                       <mml:msub>
                                          <mml:mrow>
                                             <mml:mi>x</mml:mi>
                                          </mml:mrow>
                                          <mml:mrow>
                                             <mml:mi>f</mml:mi>
                                          </mml:mrow>
                                       </mml:msub>
                                       <mml:mo>+</mml:mo>
                                       <mml:mrow>
                                          <mml:mo>∑</mml:mo>
                                       </mml:mrow>

                                                <mml:mi>f</mml:mi>
                                                <mml:mo>∈</mml:mo>
                                                <mml:msup>
                                                   <mml:mrow>
                                                      <mml:mi>F</mml:mi>

formulas.label: e0070
formulas.latex: F \left(x_{f}\right) = \left(\sum x_{f} + \sum \underset{f \in F^{'}}{\sum} x_{f} + s - 1\right)^{2} = \left(\sum x_{f} + 0 + 1 - \sum x_{f} - 1\right)^{2} = 0
